snippet.title: "How can I make my resume stand out?" w/ Chao Wang
snippet.description:
#thisisnotadvice -- Day 296

Today's question: "How can I make my resume stand out?"

Chao Wang is the co-founder and CEO of Dopple. Dopple is a children's clothing subscription service, offering the coolest kids styles in a convenient try-on-at-home model. 

We're here on #thisisnotadvice to answer all your questions about startups, venture, and the future of work.

If you have any questions you want us to answer next time, drop us a comment below or on Twitter.

For more, check out our community-edited, comprehensive reference guide on how to work: www.thisisnotadvice.work
